## Summary

<!-- One-paragraph summary. Why this change is needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🛠️ Build / CI / chore

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Relates to #456 -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the project [contribution guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I ran the build locally and it passes (`mvn package` and/or `pnpm build`)
- [ ] I added/updated tests where applicable
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]` if user-visible
- [ ] I updated docs if needed
